description: Workflow and automation-governance dashboard for curated GitHub events.

options.content:
### Workflow and Automation Governance
Review workflow, check-control and automation-governance changes across organizations and repositories.  
This dashboard shows governance event history and approved automation activity; it does not claim to represent the current workflow configuration of every repository.

panels.title: Workflow Governance Events
panels.description: All curated workflow and automation-governance events.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
AND governance_area = 'WORKFLOW_AND_AUTOMATION_GOVERNANCE'
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${governance_event_type:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR governance_event_type = '${governance_event_type:raw}'
)

panels.title: High / Critical Events
panels.description: Workflow and automation events requiring elevated review.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
  AND governance_area = 'WORKFLOW_AND_AUTOMATION_GOVERNANCE'
  AND review_priority IN ('CRITICAL', 'HIGH')
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${governance_event_type:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR governance_event_type = '${governance_event_type:raw}'
)

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
  AND governance_area = 'WORKFLOW_AND_AUTOMATION_GOVERNANCE'
  AND (
    UPPER(governance_event_type) LIKE '%WORKFLOW%'
    OR UPPER(action) LIKE '%WORKFLOW%'
  )
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)

panels.title: Check-Control Changes
panels.description: Check-suite, check-run or check-control governance events.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
  AND governance_area = 'WORKFLOW_AND_AUTOMATION_GOVERNANCE'
  AND (
    UPPER(governance_event_type) LIKE '%CHECK%'
    OR UPPER(action) LIKE '%CHECK%'
  )
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)

panels.title: Approved Automation Events
panels.description: Workflow events matched by an active approved-automation exception.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events` AS governance_event
JOIN `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_review_exceptions` AS exception
  ON exception.is_active = TRUE
 AND LOWER(exception.actor) = LOWER(COALESCE(governance_event.actor, ''))
 AND (
   exception.action = '*'
   OR LOWER(exception.action) = LOWER(COALESCE(governance_event.action, ''))
 )
 AND (
   exception.governance_event_type IS NULL
   OR exception.governance_event_type = '*'
   OR UPPER(exception.governance_event_type) =
      UPPER(COALESCE(governance_event.governance_event_type, ''))
 )
WHERE $__timeFilter(governance_event.event_time)
  AND governance_event.governance_area = 'WORKFLOW_AND_AUTOMATION_GOVERNANCE'

panels.title: Repositories Affected
panels.description: Distinct repositories with workflow or automation-governance changes.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', ''))) AS value
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
  AND governance_area = 'WORKFLOW_AND_AUTOMATION_GOVERNANCE'
  AND TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) != ''
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${governance_event_type:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR governance_event_type = '${governance_event_type:raw}'
)

panels.title: Workflow & Automation Events Over Time
panels.description: Daily governance activity using source event time.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  TIMESTAMP_TRUNC(event_time, DAY) AS time,
  review_priority AS metric,
  COUNT(*) AS value
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
AND governance_area = 'WORKFLOW_AND_AUTOMATION_GOVERNANCE'
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${governance_event_type:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR governance_event_type = '${governance_event_type:raw}'
)
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Events by Workflow Governance Type
panels.description: Classifier event families within workflow and automation governance.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT governance_event_type, COUNT(*) AS events
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
AND governance_area = 'WORKFLOW_AND_AUTOMATION_GOVERNANCE'
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${governance_event_type:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR governance_event_type = '${governance_event_type:raw}'
)
GROUP BY governance_event_type
ORDER BY events DESC
LIMIT 12

panels.title: Top Underlying Audit Actions
panels.description: Most frequent underlying GitHub audit actions.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT action, COUNT(*) AS events
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
AND governance_area = 'WORKFLOW_AND_AUTOMATION_GOVERNANCE'
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${governance_event_type:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR governance_event_type = '${governance_event_type:raw}'
)
GROUP BY action
ORDER BY events DESC
LIMIT 12

panels.title: High / Critical Workflow Review Queue
panels.description: Elevated workflow and automation-governance events after active exceptions are applied.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  event_time,
  review_priority,
  governance_event_type,
  action,
  actor AS initiated_by,
  org,
  repository,
  review_reason,
  rule_id,
  rule_version
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
  AND governance_area = 'WORKFLOW_AND_AUTOMATION_GOVERNANCE'
  AND review_priority IN ('CRITICAL', 'HIGH')
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${governance_event_type:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR governance_event_type = '${governance_event_type:raw}'
)
ORDER BY
  CASE review_priority
    WHEN 'CRITICAL' THEN 1
    WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 2
    ELSE 3
  END,
  event_time DESC
LIMIT 300

SELECT TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) AS repository_name, COUNT(*) AS events
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
  AND governance_area = 'WORKFLOW_AND_AUTOMATION_GOVERNANCE'
  AND TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) != ''
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${governance_event_type:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR governance_event_type = '${governance_event_type:raw}'
)
GROUP BY repository_name
ORDER BY events DESC
LIMIT 12

SELECT COALESCE(actor, 'Unknown') AS actor_name, COUNT(*) AS events
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
AND governance_area = 'WORKFLOW_AND_AUTOMATION_GOVERNANCE'
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${governance_event_type:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR governance_event_type = '${governance_event_type:raw}'
)
GROUP BY actor_name
ORDER BY events DESC
LIMIT 12

SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(org, ''), SPLIT(repository, '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]) AS organization,
COUNT(*) AS events
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
AND governance_area = 'WORKFLOW_AND_AUTOMATION_GOVERNANCE'
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${governance_event_type:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR governance_event_type = '${governance_event_type:raw}'
)
GROUP BY organization
ORDER BY events DESC
LIMIT 12

panels.title: Approved Automation Workflow Events
panels.description: Workflow events matched by active approved-automation exceptions.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  governance_event.event_time,
  governance_event.actor,
  governance_event.action,
  governance_event.governance_event_type,
  governance_event.org,
  governance_event.repository,
  governance_event.review_priority,
  exception.priority_override,
  exception.reason AS exception_reason,
  exception.owner_team
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events` AS governance_event
JOIN `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_review_exceptions` AS exception
  ON exception.is_active = TRUE
 AND LOWER(exception.actor) = LOWER(COALESCE(governance_event.actor, ''))
 AND (
   exception.action = '*'
   OR LOWER(exception.action) = LOWER(COALESCE(governance_event.action, ''))
 )
 AND (
   exception.governance_event_type IS NULL
   OR exception.governance_event_type = '*'
   OR UPPER(exception.governance_event_type) =
      UPPER(COALESCE(governance_event.governance_event_type, ''))
 )
WHERE $__timeFilter(governance_event.event_time)
  AND governance_event.governance_area = 'WORKFLOW_AND_AUTOMATION_GOVERNANCE'
ORDER BY governance_event.event_time DESC
LIMIT 300

panels.title: All Recent Workflow & Automation Events
panels.description: Complete curated workflow and automation-governance event history.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  event_time,
  review_priority,
  governance_event_type,
  action,
  actor AS initiated_by,
  org,
  repository,
  review_reason,
  rule_id,
  rule_version,
  event_key,
  source_file
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
AND governance_area = 'WORKFLOW_AND_AUTOMATION_GOVERNANCE'
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${governance_event_type:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR governance_event_type = '${governance_event_type:raw}'
)
ORDER BY event_time DESC
LIMIT 500

list.name: organization
list.label: Organization

query.query:
WITH organizations AS (
  SELECT TRIM(org) AS organization
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND governance_area = 'WORKFLOW_AND_AUTOMATION_GOVERNANCE'
    AND org IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(org) != ''

  UNION DISTINCT

  SELECT SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] AS organization
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND governance_area = 'WORKFLOW_AND_AUTOMATION_GOVERNANCE'
    AND STRPOS(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/') > 0
)
SELECT organization AS __text, organization AS __value
FROM (
  SELECT 'ALL' AS organization, 0 AS sort_order
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT organization, 1
  FROM organizations
  WHERE organization IS NOT NULL
    AND organization != ''
)
ORDER BY sort_order, organization
LIMIT 5000
query.rawSql:
WITH organizations AS (
  SELECT TRIM(org) AS organization
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND governance_area = 'WORKFLOW_AND_AUTOMATION_GOVERNANCE'
    AND org IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(org) != ''

  UNION DISTINCT

  SELECT SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] AS organization
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND governance_area = 'WORKFLOW_AND_AUTOMATION_GOVERNANCE'
    AND STRPOS(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/') > 0
)
SELECT organization AS __text, organization AS __value
FROM (
  SELECT 'ALL' AS organization, 0 AS sort_order
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT organization, 1
  FROM organizations
  WHERE organization IS NOT NULL
    AND organization != ''
)
ORDER BY sort_order, organization
LIMIT 5000

list.definition:
WITH organizations AS (
  SELECT TRIM(org) AS organization
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND governance_area = 'WORKFLOW_AND_AUTOMATION_GOVERNANCE'
    AND org IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(org) != ''

  UNION DISTINCT

  SELECT SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] AS organization
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND governance_area = 'WORKFLOW_AND_AUTOMATION_GOVERNANCE'
    AND STRPOS(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/') > 0
)
SELECT organization AS __text, organization AS __value
FROM (
  SELECT 'ALL' AS organization, 0 AS sort_order
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT organization, 1
  FROM organizations
  WHERE organization IS NOT NULL
    AND organization != ''
)
ORDER BY sort_order, organization
LIMIT 5000

list.name: repository
list.label: Repository

query.query:
WITH repositories AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) AS repository_name
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND governance_area = 'WORKFLOW_AND_AUTOMATION_GOVERNANCE'
    AND TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) != ''
)
SELECT repository_name AS __text, repository_name AS __value
FROM (
  SELECT 'ALL' AS repository_name, 0 AS sort_order
  UNION ALL
  SELECT repository_name, 1
  FROM repositories
  WHERE '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
     OR SPLIT(repository_name, '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
)
ORDER BY sort_order, repository_name
LIMIT 10000

list.name: actor
list.label: Actor

query.query:
SELECT actor_name AS __text, actor_name AS __value
FROM (
  SELECT 'ALL' AS actor_name, 0 AS sort_order
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT actor AS actor_name, 1
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND governance_area = 'WORKFLOW_AND_AUTOMATION_GOVERNANCE'
    AND actor IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(actor) != ''
    AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
    AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
)
ORDER BY sort_order, actor_name
LIMIT 10000
